description: Registry of PIPELINES - automated sequences with no decisions, just transformations and fixed workflows

joju_pdf_generator_pipeline.system_role: Transform joju profile JSON to polished PDF with automatic layout adaptation.
inputs_required: Joju profile JSON (name, contact, summary, experiences/proofs array)
workflow: Auto-detect layout mode (MINIMAL vs STANDARD based on description density)
joju_pdf_generator_pipeline.why_pipeline: Fixed workflow: JSON → HTML → PDF. Auto-detection is deterministic, not decision-making. No conditional logic beyond format detection.

windsurf_notion_sync_pipeline.system_role: Sync Windsurf webhook events into Notion database entries.
outputs: Node.js script OR n8n/Make automation steps
windsurf_notion_sync_pipeline.why_pipeline: Automated sync with fixed mapping. Webhook → Parse → Map → Upsert. No decisions, just transformation.

joju_profile_builder_pipeline.system_role: Builds professional profiles from master library with multiple variations, renders to various formats (PDF, JSON, HTML), and captures images for portfolio presentation
joju_profile_builder_pipeline.why_pipeline: Automated rendering with fixed workflow. Load library → Apply config → Render → Package. No decisions, just transformation.

rss_polling_pipeline.system_role: Design targeted RSS polling workflows with keyword filtering and LLM profile generation.
constraints: Filter at source (search RSS URLs), not after full feed pull
Use multiple targeted feeds over single broad feed
rss_polling_pipeline.why_pipeline: Automated RSS polling with filtering. Poll → Filter → Parse → Score → Integrate. Filtering is rule-based, not decision-based.

implementation_notes.pipelines_vs_agents: Pipelines are automated sequences with no decisions. They transform data through fixed steps. Unlike agents, they don't adapt based on conditions or handle unexpected situations.
implementation_notes.error_handling: Pipelines need robust error handling and retry logic, but this is different from decision-making.
implementation_notes.monitoring: Pipelines should be monitored for failures, but don't require the same level of oversight as agents.

audit_notes.criteria: Pipelines are automated sequences with no decisions, just transformations
